sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Boston Scientific Buyout Caps Penumbra Upside And Shifts Investor Focus
feed.summary: Boston Scientific has agreed to acquire Penumbra (NYSE:PEN) in a US$14.8 billion cash and stock deal, valuing Penumbra at US$374 per share. This acquisition is expected to cap Penumbra's near-term upside and shifts investor focus from independent growth to the deal's completion and integration into Boston Scientific. The transaction, which offers a mix of 73% cash and 27% Boston Scientific stock, is subject to shareholder approval and regulatory clearances, with significant termination fees highlighting the risks involved.

feed.title: Is the $895 Amex Business Platinum Worth It in 2026?
feed.summary: The article evaluates whether the $895 annual fee for the Amex Business Platinum Card is justified for business owners in 2026. It highlights the card's extensive benefits, including travel credits, lounge access, and various statement credits, which can offset the high fee for frequent travelers and high-spending businesses. The author also emphasizes the significant welcome offer and discusses scenarios where the card is and isn't worth the cost.

feed.title: United States Animal Feed Organic Trace Minerals Market Size
feed.summary: The global animal feed organic trace minerals market is experiencing significant growth due to increased focus on animal health and productivity, driven by advanced chelation technologies and bioavailable formulations. Asia Pacific leads the market with a 35% share, followed by North America and Europe, supported by major industry players like Alltech, Inc., Royal DSM, and Archer Daniels Midland Company. The market is segmented by type (Zinc, Selenium, Iron, Copper), form (Dry, Liquid), and application (Poultry, Dairy Cattle, Pigs, Horses), with zinc and poultry dominating their respective segments.

feed.title: Gartner: The Problems with Humanoid Robots in Factories
feed.summary: Gartner predicts that despite the attention humanoid robots receive, they will not move beyond pilot stages in factories and supply chains due to immaturity and operational limitations. The firm suggests that fewer than 20 companies will scale humanoid robots, with deployments limited to controlled environments. Instead, Gartner advocates for polyfunctional robots, which offer greater efficiency, adaptability, and cost-effectiveness for demanding supply chain operations.

feed.title: Clorox enters air care category with allergen neutraliser spray range
feed.summary: Clorox has expanded its product portfolio by entering the air care category with the launch of Clorox PURE Allergen Neutralizer. This new line of air and fabric sprays uses a plant-based active ingredient to neutralize common household allergens like pollen, dust mite matter, and pet dander. The products are available in various fragrances and are designed for daily use to manage household allergens at the source.
